title: prunella alba var. hispida
intro: Prunella alba var. hispida, also known as Selfheal or Heal-all, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which aid in wound healing, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of Prunella alba var. hispida include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb for overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Prunella alba var. hispida is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be added to salves and creams for topical application.
